{{Expand}}

{{Infobox artifact
| name = Hellraiser TX-9 heavy particle rifle
| introduced = lh-01-the-captain
}}

== The Captain ==
{{spoiler|book=lh-01-the-captain|The Hellraiser TX-9 is a heavy particle rifle materialized by [[Omega]].<ref name="lh-01-the-captain-c10">''The Captain'', chapter 10</ref>}}

== Notes ==
<references />

[[Category:Artifacts]]
[[Category:The Captain]]
[[Category:The Last Horizon]]
[[Category:The Last Horizon artifacts]]
